CustomField.formula: "Dr. " & First_Name__c & " " & Last_Name__c & IF(ISBLANK(Specialization__c), "", " {" & SUBSTITUTE( IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Cardiology"), "Cardiology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Dermatology"), "Dermatology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Emergency Medicine"), "Emergency Medicine; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Endocrinology"), "Endocrinology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Gastroenterology"), "Gastroenterology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "General Surgery"), "General Surgery; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Geriatrics"), "Geriatrics; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Hematology"), "Hematology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Infectious Disease"), "Infectious Disease; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Internal Medicine"), "Internal Medicine; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Nephrology"), "Nephrology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Neurology"), "Neurology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Obstetrics and Gynecology (OB-GYN)"), "Obstetrics and Gynecology (OB-GYN); ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Oncology"), "Oncology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Ophthalmology"), "Ophthalmology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Orthopedics"), "Orthopedics; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Otolaryngology (ENT)"), "Otolaryngology (ENT); ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Pediatrics"), "Pediatrics; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Psychiatry"), "Psychiatry; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Pulmonology"), "Pulmonology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Radiology"), "Radiology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Rheumatology"), "Rheumatology; ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(Specialization__c, "Urology"), "Urology; ", ""), "; ", "" ) & "}" )
CustomField.label: Full Credentials
